examples: It came in the form of an unsigned document known as an aide-memoire, which was delivered directly to the Iranian delegation.
For anyone still stumbling over the words, wall-to-wall coverage in official newspapers, radio and television networks has provided an aide memoire.
WHEN Michael Williams, a British geographer, sat down in 1994 to write a chronicle of deforestation, "Deforesting the Earth", he had a useful aide-memoire.
However, pervasive computing in clothing is more than just enhancing our gaming experience or wearable aide memoire.
